response: Data collection begins with identifying the sources of data to ensure accurate data representation. Data entry requires careful handling to maintain data integrity and data consistency. Data analysis involves examining data patterns to extract meaningful data insights. Data interpretation depends on cross-referencing data sources to validate data reliability. Data management ensures secure storage of data and efficient retrieval of data. Data validation confirms the accuracy of data and the completeness of data records. Data sharing promotes transparency by distributing data among relevant data stakeholders. Data evaluation concludes the study by assessing the quality of data and the usefulness of data findings.
